text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the first day of summer camp. We'll be
starting a more rigorous routine to further
improve performance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I can hear the sound of waves crashing... The
ocean is so close by.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
To strengthen oneself in the midst of nature—it
truly evokes the image of ascetic training. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes, there is much to prepare for the Kikuka Sho
and, before that, the Kobe Shimbun Hai.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now, that's enough idle chitchat. Let's begin
training right away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen and I enthusiastically begin our
summer camp training.
